case_title: BUTLER, ALPHONSE VS SHUEY, PETER T. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUTLER, ALPHONSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHUEY, PETER T. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CO. DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. PLTF DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BUTLER, ALPHONSE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUEY, PETER T. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PETER SHUEY RETURNED-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
CERT MAIL SENT TO KELLY CULLEN AGENT FOR SERVICE TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD RETURNED SIGNED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT SVENHARD SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT.
